title: primula lutea subsp. widmerae
intro: Primula lutea subsp. widmerae, also known as the yellow primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae, native to the European Alps. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Primula lutea subsp. widmerae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or infused in teas and salves to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
